outreachBrief.diagnosis: M&B Roofing appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible roofing and restoration site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion. Show service coverage, fast response, and quote intent more clearly. Turn phone or quote actions into the dominant path on mobile. The biggest revenue leak is usually weak quote intent and unclear trust on mobile.
outreachBrief.siteBrief: M&B Roofing is a roofing and restoration in Jamison Town / Greater Western Sydney. Lead with roof restorations presented around one clear local advantage: Discord image OCR showed a roofing/restoration sign with phone 0424 371 622 and free in-person quote offer Highlight roof restorations, roof repairs, gutters fascia and down pipes. Keep the tone practical, credible, conversion-focused. The main CTA should be Call now. One design choice that should stand out is high-contrast CTA.
outreachBrief.coldMessage: Hey M&B, I looked at M&B Roofing in Jamison Town / Greater Western Sydney. Discord image OCR showed a roofing/restoration sign with phone 0424 371 622 and free in-person quote offer. Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your roofing and restoration in Jamison Town / Greater Western Sydney, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like. Happy to send the mockup if you want to see it.
followUps: Quick follow-up: the clearest gap I noticed is service-area clarity. I can send over the mockup if it would help.
One more thought: nearby competitors usually do a better job showing quote or call CTA. I already mocked up a tighter version if you want to compare it.
subjectLines: Saw your listing and made this for M&B Roofing
proofPoints: Service-area and quote path can be made clearer on mobile
